scores.correctness_notes: Core notice types and pebble_custom_notice event are correct. However, the response adds pebble_check_failed/pebble_check_recovered as notice-related events (they are check events, not notice events per se), and the gold standard doesn't mention these as part of the notices answer. The check events are not sourced from notices in the same way.
scores.hallucination_notes: pebble_check_failed and pebble_check_recovered presented as notice-related events — these exist in ops but are not part of the notices subsystem per the gold standard. ops.testing.Notice class and Container usage pattern may not match the actual testing API exactly. Version numbers (ops 2.10+, ops 2.15+, Juju 3.4+, 3.6+) are specific claims not in the gold standard that may be fabricated.
